LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Some symbols in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any spins, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol.
LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: During any main game spin, whenever 1 or more Cat symbols appear on the reels, the win multiplier will be increased by 2 for each Cat symbol before wins are paid.
LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: During any free spin, whenever 1 or more Cat symbols appear on the reels, the win multiplier will be increased by 2 for each Cat symbol before wins are paid.
LuckyNekoPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_3_Payout4_4: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x2.

LuckyNekoRule.Rule1_1: Lucky Neko is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot (with an additional reel on top of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring Wilds-on-the-Way and Cat symbol multiplier.
LuckyNekoRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
LuckyNekoRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
